summary: Iteration 36: Public Affiliate Signup + Coupon & Wallet Credit System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - affiliate signup page, landing page affiliate link, admin coupon management, parent wallet tab, subscription tab coupon redemption.
critical_code_review_comments: Public affiliate signup endpoint properly exposed without authentication
Affiliate code generation format: AFF-XXXXXXXX (12 chars total)
Coupon system supports multiple types: wallet_credit, percentage_discount, free_stories, free_students, free_days
Wallet transactions properly recorded with balance_after field
seed_data_creation: Multiple test coupons and affiliates created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate signup and coupon system fully tested. Admin can create/manage coupons. Parents can redeem coupons in Wallet and Subscription tabs. Wallet balance updates correctly after coupon redemption.

affiliate_signup: POST /api/affiliates/signup with valid name+email returns affiliate_code - PASSED

Duplicate email signup returns 400 'already registered' - PASSED
